tagline.en: Pop the pod, eat the peas!

theme.hero_task: Pick and eat first pea pods from the trellis

tasks.action: Harvest first pea pods from Bed C trellis

prompt.en: Feel the pod -- when it's bumpy and fat, it's ready! Pop it open and eat the peas!
prompt.da: Maaerk skullen -- naar den er knoldret og tyk, er den klar! Knaek den op og spis aerterne!

prompt.en: How many red ones today? Keep count this week!
prompt.da: Hvor mange roede i dag? Hold taelling denne uge!

prompt.en: Midsummer watering -- every bed needs a good drink!
prompt.da: Midsommervanding -- hvert bed har brug for en god slurk!

tasks.action: Cut lettuce from Bed E (second sowing ready)

prompt.en: Cut-and-come-again! Snip the outer leaves for a salad.
prompt.da: Klip-og-kom-igen! Klip de yderste blade til en salat.

tasks.action: Check for aphids on Bed C crops -- spray water if found

prompt.en: Look under the leaves -- see any tiny green bugs? Spray them off with the hose!
prompt.da: Kig under bladene -- ser du smaa groenne insekter? Spraaejt dem af med slangen!

growth_events.event: First pea pods ready for picking on trellis

prompt.en: The peas made pods! Feel how bumpy they are -- that's the peas inside!
prompt.da: Aerterne har lavet skuller! Maaerk hvor knoldrede de er -- det er aerterne indeni!

growth_events.event: Nasturtium seedlings showing round lily-pad leaves

prompt.en: See the round leaves like little lily pads? The flowers are coming soon!
prompt.da: Ser du de runde blade som smaa aakandeblade? Blomsterne kommer snart!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow fourth succession lettuce in Bed E
